# Evaluation Snapshot

## Prompt
Compare authoring invariant-based tests with auditing existing invariant coverage and choose the clearer fit for a behavior rule.

## Expected selection
use

## Why
The task is to express a stable rule as a property that can be checked across many inputs.

## Expected object
A property or invariant statement that can be checked across a wide range of inputs.

## Boundary notes
This is a property-invariants case, not an invariant-coverage-audit case.

## Verification hooks
- name the invariant
- show it can be checked across many inputs
- avoid turning it into a coverage audit
